verificationNote: Indicative requirements for ISO 27001:2022 technological controls. Not verbatim ISO text.

requirements.requirement: Implement endpoint protection on all user devices including encryption, anti-malware, and mobile device management.
Restrict and manage privileged access rights using PAM solutions with session recording and periodic review.
Implement multi-factor authentication for access to critical systems and remote access scenarios.
Deploy anti-malware protection across all systems with automatic signature updates and behaviour-based detection.
Conduct regular vulnerability assessments, prioritize findings by risk, and remediate within defined SLAs.
Establish and maintain security configuration baselines for all systems, monitoring for unauthorized deviations.
Implement data leakage prevention controls on systems processing sensitive information, monitoring exfiltration channels.
Maintain backup copies of information and systems with documented schedules and regular restoration testing.
Produce, centralize, protect, and analyse security logs from all critical systems with tamper protection.
Implement continuous monitoring of networks, systems, and applications with SIEM-based anomaly detection.
Secure and segment networks to protect information in systems and applications, controlling traffic between zones.
Define and implement cryptographic standards including approved algorithms, minimum key lengths, and key lifecycle management.
Integrate security into the software development lifecycle with security gates, code reviews, and security testing.
Apply secure coding principles following industry standards such as OWASP, with static and dynamic analysis.
Conduct security testing including penetration testing during development and before production deployment.
Implement formal change management processes with security impact assessment, testing, and approval gates.
